more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Iran War Drives US Inflation Spike, Consumer Confidence Slumps — Report
more.description: WASHINGTON — The ongoing conflict in Iran has triggered a sharp surge in inflation in the United States, driven largely by a dramatic rise in fuel prices, according to a report by the Associated Press. more.title: DR Congo central bank to ban US dollar use
more.description: The Democratic Republic of Congo’s central bank said Thursday that it would ban the use of dollars and other foreign currencies for cash transactions in the country. Foreign currencies have gradually overtaken the use of the weak local Congo franc in recent years in stores and other places. more.description: Zimbabwe stands at a pivotal inflexion point in its digital evolution.
